Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-20-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Kurt Bridgman, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Adelaide Batanides and Vincent Kircher Properties
Steven J. Mcdonald, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Roger Blumber

Defendant Adelaide Batanides' motion for a protective order and to appoint a discovery referee is Granted in part and denied in part. The motion to appoint a referee is denied. The motion to grant a protective order is granted in part. The parties are ordered to meet and confer prior to the hearing as to setting a schedule when responses shall be served by defendants, consolidating responses and production of documents, and to incorporating by reference responses that apply to multiple plaintiff's. Defendant shall provide verified responses within 30 days of notice of this order. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
Compliance in 45 days. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft'S Further Responses To Form And Special Interrogatories And Req.'S For Production Of Documents And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Steven J. McDonald, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: Roger Blumberg
Kurt Bridgman, Esq., for defendant and opposing party: Adelaide F. Batanides

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modifications: Plaintiff Roger Blumberg's motion to compel further responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted in part. The Court will exercise its discretion and not consider the late-filed opposition. The motion is moot as to the form interrogatories. The motion is granted as to the special interrogatories. The objections having been previously waived, defendant is ordered to serve supplemental responses within 21 days of notice of this order. The motion is granted as to the request for production of documents. The Court finds that defendant asserted unmeritorious objections and failed to respond to the interrogatories in a timely fashion. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $840 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order.

MODIFICATION: Compliance by 7/13/07. Sanctions stayed pending compliance. The court did consider the late filed opposition. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
